speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Ah, my beautiful lady… and you too, [username]. Just in time for a dish worthy of royalty.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Today, we’re preparing something rich… creamy… irresistible. Butter Chicken. Just like a perfect romance, it needs patience… and a little heat.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Stay close to me through every step, okay? If anything burns, I’ll take responsibility — especially if it’s your heart.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Let’s go through our ingredients before we set the kitchen on fire — intentionally, of course.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Whole Chicken
Lemon Juice
Salt
Ginger-Garlic Paste

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Hung Curd
Mustard Oil
Degi Red Chilli Powder
Roasted Gram Flour
Crushed Black Pepper

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Onions
Tomatoes
Cashews
Cinnamon
Bay Leaf
Green Cardamom

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: [username], come here. Let’s begin our first marination — gently coating the chicken with lemon juice, salt, and ginger-garlic paste.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Massage it well… ah, not too rough. Treat the chicken like you’d treat a lady — with care.

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: Uhh… [username], focus on the chicken please.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Now for the second marination — the deeper, richer layer. Hung curd, chilli, mustard oil, and that roasted gram flour.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Mix it all together and coat the chicken again. Slowly… lovingly… flavor takes time to blossom.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Let’s prepare the gravy base. Add ghee, bay leaf, and cinnamon to the pan — hear that sizzle? That’s the sound of magic starting.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Add onions and sauté until golden. Then tomatoes, chilli, turmeric, coriander powder. Cook them until soft enough to melt for you.

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: If the onions burn, the whole gravy’ll turn bitter. Keep an eye on them!

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Now blend everything into a smooth, creamy paste. This is the heart of the dish — rich and irresistible.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Let’s grill the marinated chicken. Hear that sear? That’s passion meeting perfection.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Cook each side gently. We just want a kiss of char — enough to tempt, not overpower.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Time to unite everything. Add the gravy, honey, butter — a lot of butter — and let it simmer like a slow confession.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Add the chicken, fresh cream, and a final swirl of butter. Gorgeous… absolutely gorgeous.

speaker: Guard
dialogue_text: [username], stop flirting with the curry!.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: A little coal smoke for that restaurant charm — just two minutes. Close the lid and let the aroma seduce your senses.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: [username], look at this masterpiece. Creamy, velvety, utterly divine. Just like the company I prefer while cooking.

speaker: Sanji
dialogue_text: Serve it hot… and don’t keep a lady waiting. Especially not me.
